items.example: A sales rep visits clients to show them new products.
The IT consultant helped us set up the new network.
The architect designed a beautiful modern building.
She works as a journalist for a local newspaper.
My accountant helps me with my taxes every year.
The lawyer reviewed the contract before I signed it.
The receptionist greeted us with a smile.
The manager is responsible for the whole team.
My father retired at the age of 65.
He got fired for always coming to work late.
